header: Upgrading to Desiderio 2.6 takes minutes, not weekends
content: Desiderio 2.6 requires TYPO3 14.3+ and PHP 8.3+. Update the package, flush all caches, re-run desiderio:styleguide:seed — the seeder is idempotent, so your demo content updates in place. Rather have the creators handle it? Pro includes minor-version upgrade assistance.
